company_name: John Deere autonomous agriculture CES case
evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for AGRI_MACHINERY_PRECISION_CYCLE; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Autonomous agriculture technology is useful Stage 1 evidence, but sales, farmer ROI, and software attachment must verify it. Sources: The Verge John Deere CES autonomous equipment.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for AGRI_MACHINERY_DEMAND_CYCLE; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Precision agriculture can be promising while the machinery company is still capped by farm-income and financing cycles. Sources: Reuters Deere muted farm equipment demand.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for RIGHT_TO_REPAIR_REGULATORY_OVERLAY; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Software-enabled equipment lock-in can become a RedTeam risk if regulation or lawsuits weaken the model. Sources: AP Deere right-to-repair settlement.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for RIGHT_TO_REPAIR_CONSTRUCTION_EXPANSION; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Repair-access risk can expand beyond farm machinery, so software lock-in credit needs a broader construction-equipment RedTeam gate. Sources: Wall Street Journal Deere construction right-to-repair.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for AGRI_MACHINERY_DEMAND_CYCLE; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: CNH-style demand misses show that farm-income, crop-price, financing, and dealer-inventory evidence can override precision-agriculture narratives. Sources: Reuters CNH profit forecast demand cycle.

company_name: Bayer soy seed license crop science case
evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for AGRI_INPUT_SEED_CROP_PROTECTION; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Seed/IP licensing can support Stage 2 research, while crop-protection litigation and farmer margin remain RedTeam fields. Sources: Reuters Bayer Crop Science EBITDA and seed licensing dispute.

company_name: Nutrien potash and phosphate strategic option
evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for FERTILIZER_STRATEGIC_PHOSPHATE_OPTION; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Potash and phosphate optionality can produce cycle credit, but farmer margin, crop prices, input costs, and asset optionality keep it Watch/Yellow-first. Sources: Reuters Nutrien potash sales forecast raise, Reuters Nutrien phosphate strategic mineral review.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for FERTILIZER_INPUT_COST_SULFURIC_ACID; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
false_positive_reason: sulfuric_acid_spike; sulfur_cost_spike; ammonia_cost_spike; urea_cost_spike; guidance_withdrawal; loss_reported
notes: Phosphate pricing can look supportive, but sulfuric-acid and sulfur input costs can overwhelm margins and turn the fertilizer cycle into a 4C-watch case. Sources: WSJ Mosaic sulfuric acid input-cost squeeze.

company_name: Zoetis bird flu vaccine conditional clearance
evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for ANIMAL_HEALTH_BIOSECURITY; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Conditional approval and stockpile rebuilding can move disease news toward Stage 2, but recurring use must be checked. Sources: Reuters Zoetis bird flu vaccine conditional clearance.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for LIVESTOCK_DISEASE_PRICE_REGULATORY; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Egg-price profit spikes can be real cyclical success, but price normalization and investigations cap Green. Sources: Financial Times Cal-Maine egg profit cycle.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for VERTICAL_FARMING_UNIT_ECONOMICS; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Vertical farming can fail when consumers do not pay enough premium to cover energy and capex. Sources: Axios Bowery shutdown.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for VERTICAL_FARMING_UNIT_ECONOMICS; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Hydroponics and greenhouse capex without unit economics can become hard 4C. Sources: AppHarvest reference.

company_name: Duolingo AI strategy and softer bookings
evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for EDTECH_AI_MONETIZATION_TRADEOFF; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Education apps need bookings and monetization; AI features and user growth alone can still break the thesis. Sources: Reuters Duolingo bookings outlook.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for EDTECH_AI_DISRUPTION; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Education recurring revenue can break when AI substitutes the core service or search traffic channel. Sources: Investopedia Chegg ChatGPT impact.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for EDTECH_AI_SEARCH_DISINTERMEDIATION; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: AI search can remove the distribution channel even when education demand exists, so traffic and paid conversion become RedTeam gates. Sources: Round 169 Chegg AI search disintermediation synthesis.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for ONLINE_EDUCATION_OPM_DISTRESS; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Online education platforms need CAC, completion, student ROI, partner concentration, and debt checks. Sources: Wall Street Journal 2U Chapter 11.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for HOME_LIVING_APPLIANCE_RENTAL; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Rental accounts and care services are stronger than one-time appliance sales, but churn and overseas margin remain required fields. Sources: Coway company reference.

company_name: Whirlpool dividend suspension and hardware cycle
evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for HOME_APPLIANCE_HARDWARE_CYCLE; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Appliance hardware without recurring rental/care revenue remains exposed to housing and replacement cycles. Sources: Reuters Whirlpool dividend suspension.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for SERVICE_KIOSK_SELF_CHECKOUT; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Self-checkout installation count is weak if theft, customer friction, and operational workload rise. Sources: New York Post Target self-checkout limit, arXiv pseudo-automation research.

company_name: Santa Ana self-checkout local regulation case
evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for SELF_CHECKOUT_LOCAL_REGULATION_OVERLAY; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Local self-checkout restrictions can cap kiosk productivity narratives unless retailer compliance economics are verified. Sources: Local self-checkout ordinance reference.

company_name: Juul FDA tobacco and menthol e-cigarette approval
evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for CONSUMER_REGULATED_PRODUCT; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Regulatory approval can change Stage materially, but scope, channels, social backlash, and reversal risk remain core checks. Sources: Reuters Juul FDA approval.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for NICOTINE_ALTERNATIVE_REGULATED; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Enforcement easing can route research, but it is not the same as durable authorization, channel access, and repeat FCF. Sources: Reuters FDA unauthorized vape enforcement easing.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for NICOTINE_POUCH_YOUTH_SAFETY_OVERLAY; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Nicotine repeat consumption is not enough; youth usage and public-health warnings can cap or break the thesis. Sources: Reuters WHO nicotine pouch youth warning.

evidence_summary: Round169 R12 Loop-10 case for CANNABIS_PARTIAL_RESCHEDULING_LIMIT; unit-economics evidence is calibration-only and missing prices remain unfilled.
notes: Rescheduling can help some operators, but it is not full legalization and remains a policy/event watch. Sources: Reuters cannabis rescheduling final order.
